items.description: An off-white short-sleeved blouse with a round, gathered neckline, a partial button placket down the front, and subtly puffed sleeves with elasticated cuffs.
A long, full A-line skirt featuring a plaid pattern with dominant navy blue and white squares, accented by thin red lines. The fabric appears to be cotton or a similar light material.
White closed-toe Mary Jane style flats with a perforated or cut-out design on the vamp and a single strap across the instep with a small buckle.
A small, structured rectangular crossbody bag made of smooth, polished leather with a flap closure and a slim strap.
A smartwatch with a rectangular face and a silver-colored metallic link band.
